name: Glow Protocol
subtitle: Multi-Peptide Skin Rejuvenation Complex
overview: Combination featuring BPC-157, TB-500, and GHK-Cu marketed for skin rejuvenation and anti-aging. Individual components have research support, but combination protocols require careful dosing to avoid exceeding therapeutic ranges.
mechanism: BPC-157 provides anti-inflammatory effects; TB-500 supports angiogenesis; GHK-Cu stimulates collagen production. Fixed-ratio combinations may deliver individual peptides outside optimal therapeutic ranges.
keyBenefits: Single injection delivers multiple regenerative peptides
Theoretical additive effects from combined components
Convenience factor versus individual peptide administration

items.name: Skin Rejuvenation
items.description: Theoretical synergistic effects; formal combination studies are limited

items.name: Wound Healing
items.description: BPC-157 and TB-500 components support tissue regeneration

deliveryMethods.overview: Subcutaneous injection to abdominal area, outer thigh, or upper arm.

steps: Clean vial top with alcohol pad

interactions.notes: Different mechanisms may complement cellular energy support
Antioxidant support compatible with peptide effects
May increase skin sensitivity; monitor for irritation
Risk of copper overdose when combining products
Total daily intake may exceed therapeutic ranges

stopSigns: Severe injection site reactions or infection

good: Proper packaging stating individual peptide amounts
warning: Verify peptide content matches supplier specifications
Calculate individual peptide doses before starting
bad: Excessive individual peptide amounts exceeding recommended ranges

references.title: BPC-157 Tissue Repair Mechanisms
references.keyFindings: Dose range 250-500mcg daily shows wound healing and anti-inflammatory properties

references.title: GHK-Cu Anti-Aging Research
references.keyFindings: Demonstrates collagen stimulation and skin improvement at 1-2mg daily doses

references.title: TB-500 Angiogenesis Studies
references.keyFindings: Shows tissue regeneration effects at 2-5mg twice weekly dosing

quickStats.typicalDose: Per formulation instructions (typically 50mg GHK-Cu, 10mg TB-500, 10mg BPC-157 per dose)
quickStats.storage: Lyophilized: 2-8°C refrigerated; Reconstituted: 2-8°C refrigerated immediately after mixing
